services.contract: Maintains current freeze truth for a watch tuple, route family, cohort, publication tuple, recovery disposition, rollout rung, and trigger.
Resolves exact fallback modes only: shadow_only, read_only_provenance, placeholder_only, assistive_hidden.
Validates session, prompt, approval-gate, threshold, watch tuple, release candidate, and route-family policy bundle agreement.
Validates route contract, surface publication, and runtime publication tuple agreement.
Invalidates stale sessions, chains, work-protection leases, and patch leases on trust, policy, publication, decision, anchor, insertion, incident, or final-artifact drift.
Binds freeze recovery to ReleaseRecoveryDisposition and same-shell recovery semantics.
Blocks stale accept, insert, regenerate, export, and completion-adjacent controls while preserving provenance when policy allows.
Requires explicit refresh, regeneration, or operator unfreeze and prevents reuse of old patch leases.

invariants.description: Release freeze records are current operational truth, not only historical commands.
Only blueprint fallback modes are legal.
Publication and runtime tuple mismatch invalidates actionability.
Stale sessions block action controls and require recovery.
Old patch leases cannot return to actionability after drift.
Recovery stays in the same shell family through ReleaseRecoveryDisposition.
Accept, insert, regenerate, export, and completion-adjacent actions obey the active freeze state.
Read-only provenance can remain visible while write controls are suppressed.
Freeze records store refs and blockers rather than sensitive text.
Actionability returns only after explicit refresh, regeneration, or unfreeze.
Later UI and proof work can inspect exact blocker detail.
